required_env_vars.name: APP_ENV
required_env_vars.description: Runtime mode for backend startup and release preflight gates.

required_env_vars.name: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
required_env_vars.description: Server-only service role key required for privileged RPC/storage operations.

required_env_vars.name: MODE_SECURITY_DATABASE_URL
required_env_vars.description: Direct Postgres URL for live security posture checks.

required_env_vars.name: EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL
required_env_vars.description: Production mobile API origin; must not point to staging/local/LAN endpoints.
